violations.text: Protein bites packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC has decided to remove items from self-service sale. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
Several ceiling tiles throughout the establishment were observed in poor repair/or with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
